title: Morning Bid: Marvell, a fitting name for the latest AI darling
sentences: Morning Bid: Marvell, a fitting name for the latest AI darling A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Tom Westbrook Notwithstanding fresh hostilities in the Middle East, AI shares drove equity markets in Asia to new records on Wednesday.
